templates.title: Mission Control
templates.description: Self-hosted command center for AI agent fleets — create agents, dispatch tasks over Kanban boards, watch them ship. FastAPI + Next.js + Postgres.
templates.note: Run ./setup.sh (or setup.ps1) once to generate the .env with secure secrets before deploying the stack. Details: https://github.com/argyelan-ai/mission-control#quickstart
